title: Rule 15.18 request by creditors for a decision (company winding-up)
body: "This template will ensure full compliance with the Insolvency (England and Wales) Rules 2016 (“the Rules”) when completed properly.  You may use an alternative template/form but you will be responsible for ensuring its content complies with the Rules.  A document that fails to comply may not be accepted by the intended recipient including the office holder (official receiver, liquidator or trustee) or the court, for example. "
